Hero.description: I Analyse Data. Build Products. Optimise Processes.

Metadata.title: Christian Rodes — Digital Builder
Metadata.description: Junior Product Manager & Digital Builder. I analyse data, build products and optimise processes.

Navigation.company: Registered Limited Company in Alicante, Spain, CIF: ES-B16814840

About.label: About Me
About.p1: I see myself as a Digital ''Builder'' operating at the intersection of project management, data analysis, and software development. My focus is not just managing tasks — it''s designing efficient systems.
About.p2: I''m passionate about transforming operational complexity into clear workflows through Business Intelligence and automation. I''m not limited to overseeing a product''s lifecycle; I have the technical skills to get involved in the code (Next.js/TS) and ensure execution is as solid as the strategy.
About.p3: My goal is simple: optimise processes so technology works for the business, not the other way around.

0.impact: I lead the creation of digital products from the discovery phase through to technical launch. My role combines high-fidelity interface design in Figma with real frontend development using Next.js and TypeScript. By coding my own prototypes, I ensure a frictionless transition between product vision and final code, delivering an optimised and technically scalable user experience.

1.impact: I managed critical operations for the European market at one of the largest B2B e-commerce platforms in the automotive sector. My focus was on process optimisation through large-scale data analysis with SQL, enabling me to identify bottlenecks and coordinate international teams to improve logistical and commercial efficiency. I acted as the analytical link that translated operational performance into strategic business decisions.

2.impact: I was part of the international expansion team, acting as the functional bridge between sales teams and the IT department. I facilitated the adoption of key tools such as Salesforce and POS systems, translating real day-to-day store needs into technical requirements for developers. My work ensured that technology was an enabler rather than a barrier during the company's growth into new markets.

CaseStudyPP.delivery-2-b1: Built with Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for performance and scalability.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-2-b2: Implemented smooth animations with Framer Motion to enhance user experience.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-2-b3: Iterated quickly based on feedback, shipping incremental improvements.
CaseStudyPP.quote: "He is reliable, technically proficient, and a pleasure to work with. I thoroughly recommend him."

Home.about-p2: I help businesses shape, build, and grow exceptional digital products.
Home.about-p3: For over 15 years, I have worked across a range of industries to define strategies, design seamless user experiences, and bring products to market.
Home.about-p4: During this time, I have balanced independent consulting with in-house roles, gaining a deep understanding of what makes businesses thrive.
Home.about-p5-03: , where I now work exclusively to create high-impact digital solutions.
Home.quote-01: As a founder with a busy schedule, I needed someone who could make a difference with their expertise and confidence. Colin exceeded expectations, swiftly implementing a wave of positive changes.
Home.quote-02: Colin has all the skills you would want in a product leader: smart, creative, pragmatic, with a solid understanding of technology and a flair for design.
Home.quote-03: A detail-oriented and results-driven leader who brings a unique combination of product expertise and business acumen to every project he tackles.

Services.lifecycle: Handling the entire product life cycle
